features.name: cascaded instances with asymmetric port subset usage
features.description: Code should include two instances of the same parameterized module where one instance uses only a subset of ports (e.g., PCIN) while another uses a different subset (e.g., PCOUT), connected via an intermediate wire for cascading

features.name: signed port declarations in module interface
features.description: Code should include signed port declarations in the module interface
features.snippet: module top(input signed [29:0] A, input signed [17:0] B, output signed [47:0] P);
